note: Which services are connected, their scope, and when last validated. The /connect wizard reads and writes this so it never re-asks for something already connected.

github.method: gh CLI sign-in plus official GitHub MCP for reading
github.scope: push to the user's private work repo, read repos and issues

google.method: Google MCP via OAuth (Drive, Docs, Calendar, Gmail)
google.scope: read and write docs, file outputs, schedule

figma.scope: read references and tokens from files the user names

slack.scope: post updates, read channels the user names

pexels.method: API key in local env as PEXELS_API_KEY
pexels.scope: search free stock images and video

meta_ads.method: Official Meta Ads MCP via OAuth

ga4.method: Official Google GA4 MCP or hosted bridge
